name: WebCheck
description: An all-in-one Open Source Intelligence tool for analyzing any website
compose:
name: slashnode-webcheck
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/lissy93/web-check:2.1.0
    container_name: webcheck
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - server_data:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3093:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-webcheck_server_data
